title: January 19, 2015 – Fabian Fontenelle
summary: Fabian Fontenelle is a Zuni/Omaha artist, traditional dancer, and storyteller born in Zuni Pueblo, New Mexico with family in Nebraska. He is the great-great-grandson of the famed Chief Big Elk of the Omaha people. With powerful dance performances intertwined with traditional storytelling, Fabian dep...
